answer: \boxed{Frank Costello grooms Colin Sullivan to become an **informant (mole) inside the Massachusetts State Police**, positioning him to infiltrate and spy on organized crime for law enforcement. By training Sullivan to blend into the police force—particularly in the Special Investigations Unit—Costello ensures he can gather intelligence and undermine the mob from within. This dual role allows Costello to maintain control over Sullivan while leveraging him as a critical asset against rival criminal factions.}
